features.title: Monorepo bootstrap with Next.js + Tailwind
acceptance_criteria: App uses Next.js App Router and Tailwind
features.notes: Implemented with Turborepo and strict TypeScript settings.

features.title: Typed domain packages and workflow engine
acceptance_criteria: Requirement resolver and state machine implemented

features.title: Onboarding UI flows with server actions
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard, case creation, case detail, supplier portal pages work
Status transitions and validation actions are functional
Mock SAP and DocuWare integrations wired
features.notes: Server Actions used for mutations per Next.js best practices.

features.title: API contract routes
acceptance_criteria: Mock SAP and DocuWare adapter routes available
features.notes: Route handlers implemented in app/api with schema validation.

features.title: Validation, E2E testing and Docker Compose runtime
acceptance_criteria: Automated Playwright e2e suite passes with recorded videos/screenshots
Mailpit-based email path is wired and testable
Docker Compose services build and run successfully
features.notes: Validated with green Playwright run (9/9), artifact generation, and running web+postgres+mailpit containers.

features.title: SAP PR inbound integration + OpenAPI/Swagger contract
acceptance_criteria: Inbound SAP PR endpoint creates onboarding case with idempotency by SAP reference
Endpoint is protected by API key and validates payload schema
OpenAPI JSON and Swagger UI are exposed
features.notes: Implemented `/api/integrations/sap/purchase-requests/new-supplier`, `/api/openapi.json`, `/api/docs`, source metadata in cases, and Playwright SAP integration coverage.
